headline: Motorola Solutions to Issue First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on May 7
summary: CHICAGO, April 23, 2026--Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: MSI) will issue its first-quarter 2026 earnings results after the close of the market on Thursday, May 7.

headline: Will Motorola (MSI) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Motorola (MSI) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
